title: Federated-search relevance eval row (SRCH1)
description: One golden query → expected-results row for a content/evals/search/<domain>.jsonl set. Scored hit-rate@k / MRR / NDCG@k by the SAME evaluator machinery as the Copilot RAG evals (E1–E3), against the REAL federated catalog-search path (lib/azure/catalog-search.searchCatalog) via the internal /api/internal/search/eval-probe route. expectedResults are display-name tokens / item ids the search SHOULD surface in the top-K (matched case-insensitively, id-exact or name-substring). Floors live in content/evals/eval-floors.json under surface 'search:<domain>' and are ratcheted UP only.

id.description: Stable row id; prefix MUST equal the file domain (e.g. catalog-001).

query.description: The text a user types into federated catalog search.

expectedResults.description: Display-name tokens / item ids the search SHOULD surface in the top-K. A retrieved hit counts as relevant when an expected token equals its id or is a case-insensitive substring of its display name / item type.

domain.description: The search domain (== the file basename); becomes the surface 'search:<domain>'.

note.description: Optional authoring note (why this query matters).
